overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking a horse along a dirt path through open grassland at night. The character carries a lantern that illuminates the immediate surroundings while a crescent moon provides ambient light in the clear night sky.

agents.ego_description: leading a horse by the reins along a dirt path, holding a lantern to light the way

notable_agents.action: horse walking calmly alongside the character, following the lead

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland illuminated by lantern light
tall oak tree with dense foliage silhouetted against the night sky
cluster of trees dotting the prairie landscape
bright crescent moon visible in the clear night sky
tall dry grass covering the prairie
tall dry grass covering the prairie

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie land at night, leading a horse by the reins. A lantern illuminates the immediate path while a crescent moon hangs in the sky above scattered oak trees.

events.description: path opens up into more open grassland with fewer nearby trees

agents.ego_description: continuing to lead the horse along the winding path through open terrain

notable_agents.action: horse maintaining pace with the character on the path

entered.detail: distant rock formation visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The terrain opens into wider grassland as the character and horse move away from the scattered trees. A distant rock outcrop becomes visible on the right horizon while the moon shifts position in the sky.

events.description: path begins ascending a gentle hillside

agents.ego_description: leading the horse up a gradual incline on the dirt path

notable_agents.action: horse following closely as they climb the hill together

entered.detail: gentle slope rising ahead with scattered boulders

segments.scene_description: The path ascends a gentle hillside with the character and horse climbing together. The terrain becomes slightly more elevated with rocks visible along the path ahead, while the surrounding grassland stretches out in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit prairie that gradually ascends from a wooded path into an elevated grassland. It begins with the character leading a horse along a dirt path, where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow against the backdrop of scattered oak trees and a crescent moon. As the pair moves away from the trees, the terrain opens into wider grasslands, revealing a distant rock outcrop on the right horizon. The scene then shifts as the path begins to climb a gentle hillside, with the camera following the ascent toward a more elevated landscape. Finally, the journey continues upward as rocks appear along the path, overlooking the vast, dark expanse of the surrounding plains.
